settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Profile and book preferences. Email and password cannot be changed in this MVP.
settings.name: Name
settings.currencyLocked: Locked because there are already transactions.
settings.currencyOnboarding: Chosen during onboarding; read-only in Settings afterward.
settings.languageHint: Affects on-screen copy, tone, and date/number formats.

onboarding.currencyTimeDescription: You can change time zone and language later in Settings. Currency locks after the first transaction.
